scripts.prepublish: tar xzf ../../artifacts/super-release-linux-x86_64/super-release-linux-x86_64.tar.gz && mv super-release super-release-linux-x64 && chmod +x super-release-linux-x64 && tar xzf ../../artifacts/super-release-linux-x86_64-musl/super-release-linux-x86_64-musl.tar.gz && mv super-release super-release-linux-x64-musl && chmod +x super-release-linux-x64-musl
